name: Glassbox Digital Experience Analytics API
what_it_does: Enterprise digital experience analytics platform with REST API — providing compliant, comprehensive session recording for web and mobile with automatic PII redaction, AI-powered anomaly detection, revenue impact analysis, struggle detection (rage clicks, error clicks, form abandonment), and regulatory compliance features for financial services and regulated industries.
use_calls: Querying session data and struggle signals for UX optimization workflows
Integrating Glassbox anomaly alerts with incident management for revenue issue triage
Pulling conversion and struggle analytics for product and CX dashboards
Accessing session replay clips for specific user segments via API
Correlating technical errors with business impact metrics for engineering teams
not_for: Lightweight SMB heatmaps (use Hotjar for simpler needs)
Product feature analytics and event tracking (use Amplitude or Mixpanel)
Mobile-only crash reporting (use Instabug or Firebase Crashlytics)
best_when: A financial services, insurance, or regulated enterprise wants comprehensive session recording with automatic PII redaction and compliance features, combined with AI-powered struggle detection and revenue impact analytics.
avoid_when: You're a startup or SMB, don't need regulatory compliance features, or want lightweight heatmaps rather than enterprise-grade session intelligence.

auth.notes: API key from Glassbox account. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped with site-level segmentation. JavaScript and mobile SDK for session capture. Webhook for anomaly and alert events. No OAuth2. Enterprise SSO integration. Compliant recording with automatic PII masking.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing based on sessions; contact sales
pricing.notes: Israeli company (Herzliya). Founded 2010. Raised $175M+. IPO on TSX (Toronto Stock Exchange) 2021. Compliance-first differentiator — automatic PII redaction designed for financial services and healthcare. Mobile + web coverage in single platform. AI-powered Augmented Journey Analytics. Strong in financial services (insurance, banking, wealth management) enterprises globally.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for sessions, analytics, struggles, and anomalies. Bearer token auth. Moderate documentation. SDK required for session capture. Automatic PII redaction configured per organization policies. Enterprise compliance features require configuration. Webhook for anomalies.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Session reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by period. Struggle reads idempotent. Anomaly reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: PII redaction rules must be configured — auto-redaction is not complete without setup
Financial services compliance: verify data flows meet sector-specific requirements
Mobile and web SDKs are separate — different configuration and management
Enterprise pricing significant — validate against session volume and compliance ROI
TSX-listed company — annual report disclosures may affect product roadmap timing

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, PCI-DSS, HIPAA compliant. US, EU, Australian data residency. Bearer token auth. Comprehensive compliance for regulated industries — strongest compliance posture in session analytics category. Automatic PII redaction for session replay. Israeli company with TSX public company standards.
